arcade.steam.no_access:
<size=40><align=center><b>Steam could not be accessed.
Open Steam and relaunch the game to access the workshop.
editor.intro.welcome:
Welcome to the Project Arrhythmia (BetterLegacy) editor!
Below you'll find some settings to help you get into the editor. If you need to change them at any time, you can find them in the Config Manager.
editor.theme.legacy.desc: The default theme of the Legacy editor.
editor.theme.dark.desc: A darker version of the Legacy theme.
editor.theme.light.desc: A brighter version of the Legacy theme.
editor.theme.arrhythmia.desc: A theme based on the Arrhythmia Prototype.
editor.theme.modern.desc: A theme based on the modern editor.
editor.theme.beats.desc: A theme based on a certain game.
editor.theme.archives.desc: A theme based on the Arama Archives series.
